title: LucyMartinez
description: A resource pack that retextures the totem of undying to look like Lucy from Cyberpunk Edgerunners.
body: This resource pack transforms Minecraft's totem of undying into Lucy, the netrunner from Cyberpunk Edgerunners, featuring her distinctive white hair, red jacket, and cyberpunk aesthetic. When activated, instead of the standard totem animation, players see Lucy's character model, bringing the iconic anime character into your Minecraft world as a life-saving item that perfectly blends cyberpunk style with vanilla gameplay.
